tools.name: resolve_fragment
tools.description: Call resolve_fragment when a user describes something they can only half-remember — a book, film, song, artwork, person, or event they know exists but can't name — instead of asking a direct question. If the input reads like a memory ("there's this thing where...", "...somebody who...", "...a story

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "resolve_fragment" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash 1fc2c8ff)" → after: "Call resolve_fragment when a user describes something they can only half-remember — a book, film, song, artwork, person, or event they know exists but can't name — instead of asking a direct question. If the input reads like a memory ("there's this thing where...", "...somebody who...", "...a story "

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
